style_name: Plush Comic Toy Product Poster Style
style_summary: A loud toy-product poster style built around one fuzzy plush product hero, retro cream poster paper, a cyan circular backdrop, oversized slanted comic typography, thick black shadows, doodle annotations, sticker labels, lightning graphics, and dense campaign microcopy.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main plush product, toy vehicle, mascot object, gadget, food mascot, or collectible prop
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: parked, bouncing, leaning forward, racing, floating, charging, wobbling, or posing like a hero product
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: plush car, scooter, radio, vending machine, snack pack, mini bus, camera, delivery pod, noodle cart, or featured toy object
environment_variables.LOCATION: cream studio poster backdrop, toy catalog set, tabletop product stage, campaign poster scene, or flat editorial background
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: large cyan circle, giant tilted block headline, doodle icons, sticker labels, lightning patches, warning-card graphic, small product metadata
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short loud campaign headline, preferably 1 to 4 words
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small product-series caption, tiny spec label, date line, mock catalog note, or playful warning label
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: lightning bolt, arrow capsule, doodle fish, cloud puff, speed line, hazard triangle, steam doodle, or stitched patch
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: not applicable for objects; use plush surface styling, sewn patches, fuzzy trim, cartoon eyes, and toy-like color blocking
environment_variables.ASPECT_RATIO: 9:16 vertical poster or 16:9 horizontal campaign poster
environment_variables.PRODUCT_TEXTURE: dense fuzzy plush fiber, soft seams, raised fabric patches, embroidered symbols, matte toy finish
environment_variables.TYPOGRAPHY_LANGUAGE: Latin block type, CJK-style display type, or mixed poster typography without copied reference wording

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A loud toy-product poster style built around one fuzzy plush product hero, retro cream poster paper, a cyan circular backdrop, oversized slanted comic typography, thick black shadows, doodle annotations, sticker labels, lightning graphics, and dense campaign microcopy.
Layout: put the plush product large in the lower-middle frame, photographed as a tactile 3D product with a three-quarter view and soft studio shadow.
Place PRODUCT_OR_PROP and ACCENT_SYMBOL around the central subject as sticker-like supporting elements.
Build the biggest graphic area from oversized tilted block typography using MAIN_TEXT as the campaign headline.
Use TYPOGRAPHY_LANGUAGE to control the headline treatment and supporting type behavior.

Graphic language: retro cream poster background, turquoise and cyan anchor color, lemon yellow headline block, signal red headline block, heavy black shadows, sticker-like labels, doodle icons, arrows, lightning-bolt patches, warning-card shapes, and ACCENT_SYMBOL.
Combine soft plush 3D texture with flat printed poster graphics.
Keep the same visual genre, density level, and rendering mode across new subjects.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A loud toy-product poster style built around one fuzzy plush product hero, retro cream poster paper, a cyan circular backdrop, oversized slanted comic typography, thick black shadows, doodle annotations, sticker labels, lightning graphics, and dense campaign microcopy.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.vertical_9x16: Use a vertical poster crop. Stack the giant headline in the top third, put the plush product in the lower-middle, and place side labels along the left and right margins. Keep the cyan circle behind the product and let it crop off the sides.
composition.horizontal_16x9: Use a horizontal campaign-poster crop. Let the plush product stretch across the lower center. Put the product-series title on the left, the giant slanted headline on the right, a cyan circle behind the subject, and small doodles or sticker callouts in the remaining negative space.
layout_principles: Use one plush product as the clear hero object.
Place the object low and central with a soft studio shadow.
Use a large cyan circle behind the object as a backdrop.
Make the top-right or upper half dominated by giant tilted block typography.
Use yellow and red headline blocks with thick black shadow.
Add small doodles and sticker labels around the product without turning them into the focus.
Use product-series text on the left and compact metadata near the bottom edge.
Keep the background flat cream and avoid real-world clutter.

typography: Use oversized block display type for the main headline.
Tilt or skew the main headline and stack it in two or more layers.
Use heavy black shadows and outlines behind red or yellow text blocks.
Use compressed sans or pixel-like labels for small callouts.
Keep secondary copy short and decorative.
Do not include usernames, platform marks, QR codes, watermarks, or copied reference wording.
design_rules: Make one fuzzy plush product the clear hero.
Use tactile fuzzy fibers, soft seams, raised patches, and toy-like proportions.
Use a cream poster background with a large cyan circle behind the product.
Place the biggest headline as tilted comic block type with black shadow.
Keep the product soft and dimensional while typography stays flat and sharp.
Use bright yellow and red for headline impact.
Use turquoise or blue as the product and backdrop anchor color.
Add small doodles, sticker callouts, warning labels, arrows, and lightning marks as secondary details.
Preserve a toy campaign poster feel with bottom metadata and tiny editorial labels.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
prompt_template:
Create an image in the "Plush Comic Toy Product Poster" style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, presented as {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, placed in {LOCATION}. Use {PRODUCT_TEXTURE}. Style the object with {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Layout: put the plush product large in the lower-middle frame, photographed as a tactile 3D product with a three-quarter view and soft studio shadow. Place {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS} around it. Add a large cyan circle or oval behind the product. Build the biggest graphic area from oversized tilted block typography using "{MAIN_TEXT}" as the campaign headline.

Typography: use {TYPOGRAPHY_LANGUAGE}. Make the headline huge, angular, stacked, and slanted, with thick black outline and offset shadow. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny campaign metadata or small label copy. Keep microcopy compact and decorative, not dominant.

Graphic language: retro cream poster background, turquoise and cyan anchor color, lemon yellow headline block, signal red headline block, heavy black shadows, sticker-like labels, doodle icons, arrows, lightning-bolt patches, warning-card shapes, and {ACCENT_SYMBOL}. Combine soft plush 3D texture with flat printed poster graphics.

Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied reference text, copied brand names, or copied license-plate details.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app mark, copied reference text, copied brand name, copied license plate, exact duplicate plush car, minimalist luxury ad, glossy plastic without fibers, realistic car commercial, dark horror mood, dystopian cyberpunk, busy city background, elegant thin serif headline, unreadable paragraph-heavy layout, app screenshot UI
